subcodes.first_line: The winds of grace waft from the direction of God, the Powerful, the Mighty, the All-Knowing. Blessed is he who hath turned unto them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تمر اریاح الفضل من شطر الله المقتدر العزیز العلیم طوبی لمن اقبل الیها و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
